description_long: This is a pair of sporty wraparound sunglasses with a sleek, aerodynamic design, ideal for active urban environments. The frame is robust and features a full-rim structure with a series of small ventilation holes along the upper edge, enhancing airflow and comfort. The temples are thin, slightly curved, and intricately patterned with a lattice-like structure, providing both flexibility and a lightweight feel. The lenses are large, dark-tinted, and offer broad coverage, curving around the face for maximum eye protection from sunlight and debris. A prominent white logo is visible on both temples, adding a distinctive branding element. The bridge is integrated smoothly into the frame, with a gentle curve that fits comfortably over the nose.
description: Sporty wraparound sunglasses with a full-rim, ventilated frame, dark-tinted lenses, and lattice-patterned temples featuring a white logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, dark-tinted lenses and the full-rim frame with ventilation holes along the top.
description_view_1: Left-side angled view highlighting the thin, curved temple with a visible white logo and the lattice-like pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the frame and temples, as well as the integrated bridge and overall wraparound shape.
description_view_3: Right-side angled view similar to the left, showing the opposite temple with the same logo and structural detailing.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a wraparound, aerodynamic shape with a full-rim structure and integrated ventilation holes along the upper edge. The temples are thin, curved, and have a lattice-like openwork pattern, contributing to a lightweight and sporty appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark blue-tinted, providing a uniform, opaque appearance with no visible gradient or mirrored effect. They offer high coverage and appear to be moderately transparent.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a smooth, integrated saddle style, gently curved to fit the nose comfortably, with no separate nose pads or additional embellishments.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, slightly curved, and feature a distinctive lattice or mesh pattern along their length. A bold white logo is present near the hinge area, adding a visual accent.
attribute_brand_logo: A white logo is visible on both temples, printed or embossed near the hinge area. The logo appears stylized but no specific brand name is discernible from the images.
